findings.evidence: The PDF features merged header cells (e.g., 'Taxable Real Property:', 'Taxable Personal Property:') that span multiple sub-columns. The HTML splits these merged cells and flattens the hierarchy by concatenating the parent header text into each individual sub-column header.

findings.description: Loss of bold text formatting in table headers
findings.evidence: Column headers in the PDF are visually bolded, but rendered as regular weight text in the HTML.
